hero.title: Building the Future Through Robot Education

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: PBI Robot Education Center envisions 'a world where everyone can learn, build, and utilize robots.' Through hands-on education, expert instructors, and cutting-edge equipment, we provide optimal robot education for learners of all levels, from kids to corporations.

practice.title: Hands-on Focus
practice.description: Balanced theory and practice education, pursuing project-based learning where students build and code.

inclusion.title: Inclusive Education
inclusion.description: Creating an open educational environment where anyone can learn robotics regardless of age or background.

innovation.title: Tech Innovation
innovation.description: Continuously incorporating the latest robotics technology and teaching methods to provide forward-looking education.

certifications.title: Education Certifications & Partners
certifications.description: PBI Robot Education Center partners with domestic and international educational institutions and technology partners.
